page: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server configured with an Intel x86_64 architecture. It features 16 shared vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core. The system is equipped with 180.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 11.25 GB per core.

This server integrates a dedicated NVIDIA L40S GPU from the Ada Lovelace family, featuring 48 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided by a 1200 GB NVMe SSD, which supports fast data access for large datasets. Additionally, the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The shared CPU allocation represents a potential performance tradeoff for CPU-bound tasks, as compute resources are shared with other tenants. However, the combination of a high-capacity Ada Lovelace GPU, 180.0 GB of RAM, and fast local NVMe storage makes this configuration highly suitable for GPU-accelerated workloads such as machine learning inference, data science jobs, and graphics rendering.
description: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server designed for resource-intensive workloads. Built on the Intel x86_64 architecture, it features 16 shared vCPUs across 16 physical cores, paired with 180.0 GB of system memory. The primary accelerator is a single NVIDIA L40S GPU from the Ada Lovelace architecture, providing 48 GB of VRAM. Storage needs are met by a local 1200 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one public IPv4 address. While the shared CPU allocation introduces potential resource contention for CPU-heavy tasks, the high memory-to-core ratio of 11.25 GB and the powerful dedicated GPU make this server highly efficient for machine learning inference, data science, and rendering workloads.
og_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is a Cloud GPU server featuring 16 shared Intel vCPUs, 180.0 GB of RAM, a 1200 GB NVMe SSD, and an NVIDIA L40S GPU with 48 GB of VRAM for accelerated workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-l40s-16c-180g-48vram is an Intel-based Cloud GPU server with 16 shared vCPUs, 180 GB RAM, and a 48 GB NVIDIA L40S GPU.
tagline: An Intel-based cloud server featuring a dedicated 48 GB NVIDIA L40S GPU, 180 GB RAM, and local NVMe storage.
